violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. 3 door reach in cooler not maintaining proper product temperatures.

Laundering of linens. — --Laundry equipment was not located in area separated from exposed food or from exposed clean equipment/utensil. Laundry equipment located in food storage room adjacent to kitchen.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Move items from in front and beside hand sink to ensure proper access is manitained.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Prep sink was not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line.
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
